caption: A series of frames captures a legislative meeting within a professional office or committee room. The setting features wooden cabinetry, desks, and a projection screen. In the initial scenes, several individuals in business attire, including a man in a dark suit and others in blazers and sweaters, are seated or standing. As the sequence progresses, the camera shifts to a different angle, showing a man with a beard and glasses gesturing with his hands while speaking to the group. On-screen text at the bottom of every frame includes the "ORCA" logo and the text "April 12, 2019," "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs," and a green banner stating "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage." The scene transitions from a wide shot of attendees to a focused view of the speaker and those listening to him.
